decisions.description: Enable bufferUpdates on DefaultSearchPlugin so bulk imports deduplicate multiple updates for the same entity into a single reindex operation.
Replace SqlJobQueueStrategy — which polls the database every 200 ms per queue — with BullMQJobQueuePlugin for push-based Redis-backed job distribution.

Split workers using the activeQueues option: dedicate one worker to the search queue and another to general queues (emails, collection filters), so reindex work does not block order confirmation emails.
Instrument reindex duration, database CPU during reindex, job queue depth, and p95 search latency; target p95 search latency below 200 ms (down from 800 ms during reindex).

action_items.text: Enable bufferUpdates and migrate the job queue to BullMQJobQueuePlugin
Set up the dual-worker deployment using activeQueues to isolate the search queue
Instrument reindex duration, DB CPU, queue depth, and p95 search latency
